advancements.pesticides.core.first_pesti: And that's how you make ecologists happy !
advancements.pesticides.core.root.descri: The start of every pesticide industry, zombie bones !
advancements.pesticides.core.root.title: Pesticides
block.pesticides.faucet.info:
A faucet lets you dispense pesticide on crops. By providing it a redstone signal you can disable it.
You can also SHIFT+CLICK on it to toggle cycle between its 2 modes: 'single' and 'double'.

When in single mode, pesticides only get fired in front of the faucet and it has a radius of 5x3x5
When in double mode, its pesticide consumption doubles and also fires pesticide in both sides and it has a radius of 5x5x5
item.pesticides.cotton_swab.info:
Cotton swabs are used to find out if a farmland or crop has been infected.
The more the land has been infected the more likely it is to work.
item.pesticides.faucet_analyser.info: A faucet analyser allows to know the volume of pesticide left in a faucet
item.pesticides.faucet_analyser.onUse: This faucet has %s mb of %s and is currently %s
item.pesticides.pesticide_container.infe: Infected with pesticide (this doesn't normally show up)
item.pesticides.zombie_bone.info: Zombie Bones have a high chance of dropping from zombies. They are very useful to the creation of pesticides.
